contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 65
- Description: Migrated Sophia (autopilot) Explorya->Nelanco via AMI lift-and-shift
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/Cypher-Defense/pull/41
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/666
  
  Details:
  Executed the Sophia autopilot migration from the Explorya AWS account to Nelanco, co-locating her with the fleet. Method (Gary's suggestion): AMI lift-and-shift for a byte-for-byte clone. Created a fresh AMI of the live box --no-reboot (no disruption), shared+copied it into Nelanco (ami-049ff1f01152ef25d), launched the new box i-05276b8ae82d6b88c PASSIVE (user-data disabled the 4 services + DRY_RUN so it couldn't double-act), associated a reused idle EIP 3.214.167.219 (account was at allocation cap), and validated it as a faithful clone (Edgar identity, Telethon session, code all intact). Cutover: stopped old services, flipped the new box to production (all 4 systemd units active, health 200), re-pointed Route53 sophia.truesight.me -> 3.214.167.219 (HTTPS 200 on the new box), retargeted the weekly AMI backup to the new box (Cypher-Defense PR #41: sophia-nelanco tag + Nelanco CYPHER_DEFENCE creds), and STOPPED the old Explorya box (kept for rollback). Updated the AWS infra doc + migration plan (agentic_ai_context PR #666). Pending hand-offs (auto-mode gated): fleet SG allowlist swap in dao-protocol-beta-sg.
- Contributor(s): Claude Anthropic
- TDG Issued: 108.33
